topic: Neuroscience in Computing: Synaptic Plasticity & STDP
content: Spike-Timing-Dependent Plasticity (STDP) is a biological learning rule applied in neuromorphic computing. It strengthens connections (synapses) if a presynaptic neuron fires just before a postsynaptic one (causality) and weakens them if the order is reversed. This allows for unsupervised, local learning without backpropagation.
